privileged_info_summary: The task operates on five real, publicly available Wireshark sample packet capture files: http.cap, dns.cap, telnet-cooked.pcap, 200722_tcp_anon.pcapng, and smtp.pcap. These are official sample files from the Wireshark Foundation, downloaded from https://wiki.wireshark.org/ during environment setup. The metadata correctly specifies the capture directory (/home/ga/Documents/captures) and report output path (/home/ga/Documents/forensic_report.json). Verified sample properties: http.cap contains 43 packets spanning 30.39 seconds with 583.51 bytes average packet size in Ethernet encapsulation; dns.cap contains 38 packets spanning 278.88 seconds with 97.53 bytes average packet size in Ethernet encapsulation. All specified files are authentic, non-synthetic network packet captures used for educational and analysis purposes.
